title: Star Baby Teether – 5 Unique Shapes with Textures & Colours – Soft Silicone Teething Ring for Infants 3+ Months – Heated Sensory Toy – Sterilizable, BPA-Free, Gum Relief – Baby Gift Idea
features: Multi-Texture Star Teether for Babies: This star teether features 5 uniquely textured points that soothe teething pain while supporting sensory development and mouthing. Specially designed for infants 3+ months, it promotes safe chewing, improves grip strength, and keeps babies comforted during tough teething stages.

Teething Relief Through Sensory Play: Each soft silicone star shape offers a different texture to gently massage sore gums, providing calming teething relief. As babies chew, the toy encourages fine motor skills, sensory exploration, and self-soothing—perfect for both quiet time and playtime stimulation.

Bright Colours to Capture Baby's Focus: The vibrant, eye-catching colours of this teething toy stimulate baby’s developing vision and offer playful distraction during teething discomfort. Whether at home, in the pram, or during car rides, the cheerful colour palette keeps infants visually engaged and calm.

Soft Silicone, Built for Daily Use: Made from food-grade, BPA-free silicone with no glues or harsh chemicals, this safe teether is built to last. It’s soft enough to chew yet strong enough to handle daily teething needs—ideal for babies who love to bite, pull, or gnaw throughout their teething journey.

Sterilizable and Dishwasher-Safe Design: Hygiene is effortless with this sterilizable and dishwasher-safe teether. Whether you're at home or travelling, you can keep it clean and safe for daily use. A great solution for UK parents seeking a teething toy that's both practical and easy to maintain.
description: Product Description Introducing our Star Heated Sensory Toy Set, a delightful collection designed to engage and entertain. This set features five different shapes, each boasting a unique texture and color, providing a multi-sensory experience for users. Crafted from high-quality silicone without any gluing, these toys ensure durability and safety during play. The varied textures of each shape offer a tactile experience, promoting sensory exploration and stimulation. The vibrant colors add an extra layer of visual appeal, creating an engaging and exciting playtime experience. One of the standout features is the sterilizable silicone material, allowing for easy cleaning and maintenance. The toys can be safely sterilized, ensuring a hygienic play environment for children. Whether for sensory therapy or simply playful exploration, the Star Heated Sensory Toy Set is a versatile and safe option for children of all ages. Engaging Set: Star Heated Sensory Toy Set with 5 different shapes for interactive play. Sterilizable: Toys can be easily sterilized for a hygienic play environment. Varied Textures: Each shape boasts a unique texture, promoting sensory exploration. Vibrant Colors: Eye-catching colors add visual appeal to the playtime experience. Silicone Construction: Crafted from high-quality silicone without gluing for durability.
